title: senecio clivicola
intro: Senecio clivicola, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from its sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin irritations, and wounds, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Senecio clivicola can be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
